roles.name: customer
roles.description: Regular customer who can place orders, browse products, create bids, and manage closet

roles.name: tailor
roles.description: Tailor who can create offers for bids, manage portfolio, and view bids

roles.name: material_seller
roles.description: Material seller who can add and manage products, receive orders, and view analytics

roles.name: admin
roles.description: Administrator with access to all admin endpoints

errorCodes.400: Bad Request - Invalid parameters or data
errorCodes.404: Not Found - Resource does not exist
